description: Composition Black tracksuit set made of a cotton/polyester blend Black tracksuit jacket has a mock collar with a full front zipped closure, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, panel and embroidered branding on the left chest and a ribbed hem Black track pants have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, mesh lining, insert pockets on the sides and embroidered branding below the left pocket Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash inside out with like colours using mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decoration Look great while training in this black tracksuit from puma. The fabric offers absolute sweat-free comfort, allowing you to train longer and stronger. This tracksuit can be worn together or as separates and is perfect for gym sessions or for sporting activities. Model statistics Product is a size S on a model of height 6', waist 32&rdquo and shoulders 18"
